creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #9)
It's certainly not ideal, but currently the vulnerability checking mechanism in the ports tree is overzealous and blocks installation of vulnerable ports unless people set DISABLE_VULNERABILITIES.  After complaints from users I considered this blocking to be worse than the vulnerabilities.

Recently Red Hat released a fix for one of the vulnerabilities so that one has been documented again.
